acceptance_scope: overt non-person resource/artifact/spatial part + adjacent 用嚟/用來 + overt non-perfective action predicate; no separate user, modal, copula, negator, perfective actual-use, or hidden argument

qualifying_examples.limitations: Does not settle subject/topic status, frequency, or unique parser analysis.
Editorialized interview-derived narrative rather than marked verbatim speech; spatial-resource profile only.

qualifying_examples.surface: 呢間屋用嚟擺嘢、養豬養牛
qualifying_examples.source_kind: official government page with direct homeowner quotation
qualifying_examples.limitations: One speaker/context; does not license unrestricted resource classes, coordination, frequency, or parser terminology.

structural_support.role: supports purposive 嚟 and conventionalized 用來/用嚟; not counted as a natural attestation

boundary_sources.role: restricts broader purposive, participant, and actual-use profiles
competing serial-purpose analyses and semantic/pragmatic restrictions

decision: Standing three-example minimum met without lowering the threshold; exact narrow subtype eligible for supported_productive after all other gates passed.
